shortFormVideo.hook: Most local businesses do not need a bigger CRM first. They need the first five minutes after a lead comes in to stop leaking work.
shortFormVideo.brief: 30-45 second vertical video. Open with the missed-lead problem, show the simple stack: form capture, qualification, routing, reminders, and reporting, then close with the EB28 article URL and Melbourne Web Studio project brief.
